warnings: Bear cases do not change ratings beyond evidence-gated classifications.

bear_cases.core_bull_thesis: MYRG is a focused electrical contractor with utility T&D and C&I/data-center adjacency, positive FCF, and less extreme sales multiples than the most crowded equipment names.
bear_cases.strongest_bear_case: segment-specific data-center backlog missing; project execution and labor risk; 12m price momentum indicates partial repricing
thesis_kill_conditions: margin durability in C&I and T&D

evidence_against_thesis.summary: Market data: EV/Sales 1.788, P/S 1.8146299, FCF $227.8M, 12m price change 172.8%.
No major filing-search gaps from selected terms, but manual verification still needed.

bear_cases.core_bull_thesis: POWL has the strongest filing-level evidence for backlog, switchgear/power systems, and data-center diversification, but valuation and momentum show substantial repricing.
bear_cases.strongest_bear_case: EV/Sales and P/S near 9x; 12m price change above 370%; data-center-specific customer concentration missing

evidence_against_thesis.summary: Market data: EV/Sales 9.006, P/S 9.485606, FCF $142.2M, 12m price change 370.7%.
No segment revenue evidence found in retrieved filings.

bear_cases.summary: Keep POWL as Wait for Pullback.

bear_cases.core_bull_thesis: MOD has hard filing evidence that Data Centers are 35% of fiscal 2026 net sales and offers CDUs/rear-door/immersion-adjacent solutions, but FCF is negative and valuation/momentum are stretched.
bear_cases.strongest_bear_case: negative FCF; high P/E/EV multiples; customer names and segment margin missing

evidence_against_thesis.summary: Market data: EV/Sales 4.719, P/S 4.557522, FCF $-101.5M, 12m price change 192.9%.
No segment revenue evidence found in retrieved filings.

bear_cases.summary: Keep MOD as Wait for Pullback.

bear_cases.core_bull_thesis: ATKR is cheaper and cash-generative with electrical infrastructure exposure, but data-center-specific validation is weaker and the products may be more commoditized.
bear_cases.strongest_bear_case: P/E missing from market data; broad distributor exposure; less clear chokepoint power

evidence_against_thesis.summary: Market data: EV/Sales 1.097, P/S 0.931367, FCF $255.0M, 12m price change 19.2%.
No segment revenue evidence found in retrieved filings.

bear_cases.core_bull_thesis: BDC has direct data center and Smart Infrastructure evidence with reasonable valuation versus crowded power names, but it is more network/connectivity than core power infrastructure.
bear_cases.strongest_bear_case: not pure power infrastructure; segment transition/realignment; modest price momentum may reflect weaker growth
thesis_kill_conditions: AI data center versus general network exposure

evidence_against_thesis.summary: Market data: EV/Sales 2.004, P/S 1.6076756, FCF $81.4M, 12m price change 7.1%.
No major filing-search gaps from selected terms, but manual verification still needed.

bear_cases.core_bull_thesis: IESC has data-center and electrical services exposure with positive FCF, but valuation and price momentum are already high and exact data-center backlog is missing.
bear_cases.strongest_bear_case: near 52-week high; EV/Sales over 4x for services business; segment revenue missing

evidence_against_thesis.summary: Market data: EV/Sales 4.07, P/S 4.1119447, FCF $271.9M, 12m price change 186.3%.
No segment revenue evidence found in retrieved filings.

bear_cases.core_bull_thesis: AEIS has power-conversion relevance and AI/energy-efficiency exposure, but market data shows high valuation and direct data-center commercial validation is incomplete.
bear_cases.strongest_bear_case: EV/Sales over 7x; P/E over 70x; direct AI data-center revenue not isolated

evidence_against_thesis.summary: Market data: EV/Sales 7.065, P/S 7.442041, FCF $49.2M, 12m price change 188.6%.
No segment revenue evidence found in retrieved filings.

bear_cases.summary: Keep AEIS as Wait for Pullback.

bear_cases.core_bull_thesis: VICR has technically relevant vertical power delivery for AI accelerators, but valuation is extremely stretched and commercial validation is not yet enough for a core thesis.
bear_cases.strongest_bear_case: EV/Sales above 30x; P/E above 100x; large price repricing; customer concentration/design-win details missing

evidence_against_thesis.summary: Market data: EV/Sales 31.519, P/S 32.449493, FCF $9.0M, 12m price change 595.9%.
No segment revenue evidence found in retrieved filings.

bear_cases.summary: Keep VICR as Wait for Pullback.

bear_cases.core_bull_thesis: GNRC could benefit if data centers adopt more backup/on-site power, but current evidence is more scenario optionality than proven AI data-center revenue.
bear_cases.strongest_bear_case: P/E/EV multiples high; data-center revenue/backlog missing; permitting/emissions risk

evidence_against_thesis.summary: Market data: EV/Sales 3.831, P/S 3.5699008, FCF $115.3M, 12m price change 110.4%.
No backlog evidence found in retrieved filings.

bear_cases.core_bull_thesis: FLNC has grid-storage relevance to power-constrained loads, but direct AI data-center validation is weak and FCF remains negative.
bear_cases.strongest_bear_case: negative FCF; storage market competition; data-center revenue not proven

evidence_against_thesis.summary: Market data: EV/Sales 1.259, P/S 1.6908195, FCF $-133.7M, 12m price change 373.3%.
No segment revenue evidence found in retrieved filings.

summary: Primary sector bear case: demand is real but highly crowded; valuation has already repriced many names; supplier-level proof remains incomplete.
